plugins.name: kubevirt
plugins.description: Core KubeVirt workflows for code review, linting, CI analysis, and VEP management

commands.name: ci-health
commands.description: Analyze overall CI health across merge-time jobs with failure trending

commands.name: ci-lane
commands.description: Analyze recent runs and failure patterns for a specific CI job lane

commands.name: ci-report
commands.description: Generate comprehensive CI health reports for stakeholders

commands.name: ci-search
commands.description: Search for specific test failures and patterns across all CI jobs

commands.name: ci-triage
commands.description: Intelligent CI failure triage with root cause analysis and prioritized recommendations

commands.name: create-eval-from-docs
commands.description: Generate MCPChecker evaluation tasks from KubeVirt user-guide documentation

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Lint a path and generate a plan to fix issues with separate commits per linter

commands.name: review-ci
commands.description: Review CI failures for a given PR and provide analysis with remediation suggestions

commands.name: review-list
commands.description: List open PRs pending your review, filterable by user, SIG, or repo

commands.name: review-pr
commands.description: Review a GitHub PR using gh CLI, applying KubeVirt project best practices

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review local branch changes using KubeVirt project best practices

commands.name: vep-find-reviewers
commands.description: Find potential reviewers for a VEP based on SIG ownership and recent code activity

commands.name: vep-groom
commands.description: Review a VEP proposal against template requirements and process guidelines

commands.name: vep-list
commands.description: List open KubeVirt Enhancement Proposals (VEPs) with status and filtering

commands.name: vep-review-list
commands.description: List VEP proposal and implementation PRs for VEPs you are assigned to review

commands.name: vep-summary
commands.description: Get a TL;DR summary of a specific VEP and its current state

skills.name: Create Eval from Docs
skills.description: Detailed implementation guide for the /kubevirt:create-eval-from-docs command - generates MCPChecker evaluation tasks from KubeVirt user-guide documentation by extracting workflows, mapping to MCP tools, and producing v1alpha2 task YAML files

skills.name: VEP Find Reviewers
skills.description: Detailed implementation guide for finding VEP reviewers via OWNERS_ALIASES and git history analysis
